channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Light out, 12th July
item.description:
Light out its pitch black at night Been like it for three weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watery Lane, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: Giant tree blocking lught and falling leaves and debris cover gardens, 12th July
item.description:
Trree has been repotlrted many times over several years. You just say its been moved on to appropiat department. This is a joke

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Amunds Close, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped, 12th July
item.description:
At approximately 10am on the 12th July I witnessed three Asian men wearing faded orange hi-vis bibs carry a sofa and accompanying cushions, out from the hand car wash on Maidstone Road and pile them up to the right of their premises (as you look at it from the road). They piled them up set back from the road a little but piled up beside their boundary. It is clear that they worked at the hand car wash although they were accompanied by an older white man who appeared to be a member of the public.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maidstone Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over filled bin, 12th July
item.description:
Bin has been over filled for some time. Doggie bags are now littered around and foxes get into this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tag sprayed on wall, 12th July
item.description:
Please clean off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93-95, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Beer cans and other waste litter everywhere, 12th July
item.description:
Please collect all of this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Private tree blocks the pathway, 12th July
item.description:
A bush/tree that is growing in the corner of the front yard has overgrown and is blocking the pathway for pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Drain is completely blocked, 12th July
item.description:
Has been blocked for a while, needs fixing please!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 outside number 278 pl, 12th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 outside number 278 please see picture…..various issues…. food recycling bin damaged, instruction on food recycling bin need replacing if bin repairable and footpath needs repairing. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to multi teams who need to deal with this for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 12th July
item.description:
Vehicle broke down on Saturday and has been left here since. Windows are wide open and it's also obstructing entrance and restricting already limited parking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Place, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 number 268 shop shutter, 12th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 number 268 (next to Ullswater Road junction) grey shop shutter graffiti tagged. (Think Co-op funerals may be shut.) Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin and picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 268, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gutter and pavement covered in litter, 12th July
item.description:
Combermere rd covered in litter. Persistent daily littering issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 12th July
item.description:
Trolley left on pavement plus excess rubbish along road again. Photo of trolley shows looking towards main road from Bromley to Shortlands

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 12th July
item.description:
There is a large amount of rubbish on the grass and on the pavement either side of the street near the convenience store. Looks awful.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
